title_en: Unlock the Power of Sweet Potatoes!
hook_en: Did you know sweet potatoes are a superfood?
key_message: Sweet potatoes are rich in beta-carotene, fiber, and potassium. Eat them with a splash of olive oil to boost nutrient absorption.
visual_elements: close-up of a raw sweet potato
drizzling olive oil over roasted sweet potato
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Sweet Potato — Rich in beta-carotene, fiber, and potassium — a true superfood (Tip: Eat with a small amount of fat (olive oil) to boost beta-carotene absorption by 6x)

hook_en: Want to get the most out of your sweet potatoes?
key_message: Combining sweet potatoes with a small amount of fat, like olive oil, can increase beta-carotene absorption by six times.
visual_elements: showing sweet potatoes in a basket
pouring olive oil into a small dish
adding olive oil to mashed sweet potatoes
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Sweet Potato — Rich in beta-carotene, fiber, and potassium — a true superfood (Tip: Eat with a small amount of fat (olive oil) to boost beta-carotene absorption by 6x)
